cv_data.title: CVData
cv_data.description: The interactive CV profile containing contact info, professional summary, structured work experiences, higher education, and grouped technical skill categories.

contact.description: Contact details of the candidate: email, phone, location, github, linkedin, website.

summary.description: The candidate's core profile summary, bio, or professional statement.

experience.description: The candidate's historical professional work trajectory containing roles, companies, dates, and metric bullets.

education.description: The candidate's higher academic education history.

skillCategories.description: List of categories of skills, each hosting individual skills with optional level descriptors.

updatedAt.description: Standard timestamp for matching operational sync logs.

project.title: Project
project.description: A single portfolio project item showcasing client or personal developments.

id.description: Unique identifier of the project document.

description.description: Short introductory summary of the project.

longDescription.description: Detailed multi-paragraph description outlining technical problems, solutions, and impacts.

technologies.description: Array of technology tags with corresponding categories.

highlights.description: List of key features, metrics, or technical achievements.

/cv_data/main.description: The primary entry point storing the entire candidate identity and ATS resume parameters.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Collection of projects showcasing developer developments. Can be added, list, and edited.
